modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help formatting chart titles in Excel.

full_description_text:  
- I'm trying to format the titles on my charts in Excel.  
- I can't figure out how to change the font size or color.  
- It's really frustrating because I want my charts to look professional for a presentation.
short_description: Need help formatting chart titles in Excel.
description:
- I'm trying to format the titles on my charts in Excel.  
- I can't figure out how to change the font size or color.  
- It's really frustrating because I want my charts to look professional for a presentation.
